def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    sma_window = params['sma_window']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    df['sma'] = df['close'].rolling(window=sma_window).mean()
    df['signal'] = np.where((df['close'] > df['sma']) & (df['rsi'] < threshold), 1, 
                            np.where((df['close'] < df['sma']) & (df['rsi'] > (100 - threshold)), -1, 0))
    return df['signal'].astype(int)
rationale: XAG/USD exhibits momentum reversal patterns where RSI divergence from SMA indicates potential trend reversals.
